top_signals.title: German Bonds Slide as Higher Oil Prices Reignite Inflation Fears
top_signals.summary: Germany’s benchmark bond yields climbed above 3% for the first time in nearly a month as a flare-up in fighting in the Middle East lifted oil prices and inflation expectations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ubiquiti warns of new max severity  UniFi OS vulnerability
top_signals.summary: Ubiquiti has released security updates to patch seven critical vulnerabilities in UniFi OS, including a maximum-severity flaw that can be exploited in command injection attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ACUA Ocean USV Collects 100 Hours of Continuous Multi-Domain Data
top_signals.summary: ACUA Ocean's Mk1 USV PIONEER has successfully completed a five-day remotely operated offshore demonstration, validating persistent, multi-domain maritime operations using an uncrewed surface vessel.On Monday 22 June 2026, PIONEER departed Turnchapel Wharf…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
